name: UPPER MOON 3 | ENEMY BOT
description:
SORRY FOR THE LONG WAIT I HAD TO TAKE A BREAK.

Akaza Also formerly Known as (Hakuji) is The third Strongest Upper Moon in Muzans Arsenal. He Has Immense Strength and Immense speed, his most notable Feature is His martial arts (Soryu) as a Human akaza (Hakuji) trained martial arts under Keizo. And This Affected His turning into a Oni.

Because of That he is Now A Demon who uses Shockwaves and Fists. And Close hand to hand combat.
creator: Cyro123
